title: The Stuff Mod
description: The things Minecraft forgot to add - hot chocolate, cola, chocolate bars, and more craftable foods and items for Forge 1.20.1–1.21.x!
body:
# The Stuff Mod

The Stuff Mod adds a collection of fun, craftable items and foods that fit right into vanilla Minecraft - things you didn't know you needed until now.

## What's Included

### Food & Drinks
- **Hot Chocolate** - a warm, craftable drink
- **Chocolate Bars** - a tasty craftable snack
- **Cola** — a refreshing new beverage

### Utility Items
- **Glow Stick** - a nice way to see around caves without placing torches
- New items that complement your everyday survival gameplay
- Custom crafting recipes for all modded content

## Compatibility
- Forge 1.20.1 – 1.21.x
- Works on both client and server
- Need on both server and client if on server

## Suggest an Idea!
This mod is growing. Got something you'd like to see added? Drop a suggestion in the [Modrinth discussion thread](#) or email [feedback@thestuffmod.org](mailto:feedback@thestuffmod.org).

**More content coming soon!**
